text:
There once was a cat who couldn't climb trees. The other cats enjoyed jumping effortlessly to great branches. Every time the cat tried to climb a tree, it would land with a gentle thump on the ground.

The cat was quite depressed. It would spend hours staring off into the woods, dreaming of bounding through those wonderful branches.

One day, while meowing pitifully, the cat heard a lovely singing voice. It was a squirrel who could play the flute!

The cat watched in awe as the mouse flitted up a tree. "How do you do that?" it asked.

The squirrel just shook its head. "Oh, it's just nature," it replied. "Everything just… goes."

Feeling a bit inspired, the cat decided to practice its own flute. It made a silly tune, but it wasn't half bad. The other animals listened and laughed. Even though the cat couldn't fly, it felt pretty amazing.
